pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve potential classpath issues during migration.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock standalone dependency for HTTP service mocking in tests.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing with specific configuration and exclusions.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Add a new Maven profile 'wiremock' to enable H2 database and specific spring profiles when WIREMOCK env var is set.
Add a new Maven profile 'integration' to enable H2 database and frontend build steps when INTEGRATION env var is set.
Restructure pom.xml with extensive comments and section headers for better readability and maintenance.
Update JaCoCo plugin exclusions to match new package structure and added classes.
Add explicit configuration for maven-surefire-plugin to fix event transmission issues.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine's apk package manager.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Install bash explicitly via apk to support shell scripts and nvm installation.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Upgrade Node.js installation method from NodeSource 12.x to NVM-managed Node 16.20.0.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Define the specific Java JAR execution command as the container entrypoint.
Copy application source, frontend, and configuration files into the build context.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment, including updated instructions, version info, and feature descriptions.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with new template text

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project name or context.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default with TypeScript type annotation.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the new @storybook/addon-onboarding to the addons list.
Add @chromatic-com/storybook addon for visual testing integration.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework as react-webpack5, which is required for newer Storybook versions.
Configure staticDirs to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin configuration that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or deprecation in newer webpack/storybook versions.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Removed import for react-bootstrap-table-next CSS which is no longer used in the project.
Added import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Added imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook.
Added import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Initialized Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL logic to support both localhost and GitHub Pages environments.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added `initialize({ serviceWorker: { url: mockServiceWorkerUrl } })` with logic to detect localhost vs remote host.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Wrapped Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications in the preview.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added `<ToastContainer />` inside the decorator's JSX tree.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Refactored Storybook preview configuration to use the modern `preview` object export pattern with controls and loaders.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Replaced `export const parameters` with `const preview = { parameters: { controls: ... }, loaders: [mswLoader] }` and `export default preview`.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Adjust the baseUrl in jsconfig.json to use a relative path without the leading dot for cleaner configuration.
Explicitly define the include array in jsconfig.json to specify which directories should be included in the project scope.
